subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thou hast been prevented from making mention by reason of that which hath befallen from My brother and those who followed him thereafter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله قد منعت عن الاذکار بما ورد علی من اخی و الذین اتبعوه بعد الذی
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
